1110010011100111 1110011010000111 0 -> sum: 1100101101101110, cout: 1
0111110101000110 0110001000010110 1 -> sum: 1101111101011101, cout: 0
0001111010001000 0001010010101110 0 -> sum: 0011001100110110, cout: 0
1010110110110001 1000111001001110 1 -> sum: 0011110000000000, cout: 1
0101000001101010 0110000010010000 0 -> sum: 1011000011111010, cout: 0
1010111011100010 1100101010110110 0 -> sum: 0111100110011000, cout: 1
0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0
1111111111111111 1111111111111111 1 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 1

1111111111111111 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
0000000000000000 0000000000000001 0 -> sum: 0000000000000001, cout: 0
0111111111111111 1000000000000001 1 -> sum: 0000000000000001, cout: 1
